title: aragoa lucidula subsp. lanata
intro: Aragoa lucidula subsp. lanata is a plant species that belongs to the family Piperaceae, commonly known as the pepper family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aragoa lucidula subsp. lanata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Aragoa lucidula subsp. lanata can be prepared as a tea or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
